action.reasoning: Observation: MLP-based PPO got 0% success on nearly all environments. Analysis: Flattening the grid destroys spatial information - MLPs can't learn spatial patterns like walls, doors, keys. CNN with proper image processing should dramatically improve results. Also need higher entropy for exploration in sparse-reward environments. Decision: Rewrite with CNN feature extractor, proper image wrapper, higher entropy coefficient, and train 500K timesteps per env.
